/src/bar.tlua(1,7): error TLUA2322: Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
/src/foo.tlua(1,7): error TLUA2322: Type 'string' is not assignable to type 'number'.


==== /src/foo.tlua (1 errors) ====
    local x: number = "";
          ~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'string' is not assignable to type 'number'.
    
==== /src/bar.tlua (1 errors) ====
    local y: string = 1;
          ~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
